## edu-cli class apply

Apply to join a class using an invite code (学生使用邀请码申请加入班级)

```
edu-cli class apply [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                 help for apply
      --invite-code string   Invite code (required)
      --message string       Optional message to the admin
```
